The username vault resource id that corresponds to the existing domain username. IMPORTANT: make sure that vault resource id and secret uri are pointing to the same vault.
The username secret uri without version that corresponds to the existing domain username. IMPORTANT: make sure that vault resource id and secret uri are pointing to the same vault.

The size of the session host VMs in GB. If the value of this parameter is 0, the disk will be created with the default size set in the image.
Whether the VMs created will be hibernate enabled
Number of session hosts that will be created and added to the hostpool.

This prefix will be used in combination with the VM number to create the VM name. If using 'rdsh' as the prefix, VMs would be named 'rdsh-0', 'rdsh-1', etc. You should use a unique prefix to reduce name collisions in Active Directory.
Select the image source for the session host vms. VMs from a Gallery image will be created with Managed Disks.

Specifies the SecurityType of the virtual machine. It is set as TrustedLaunch to enable UefiSettings. Default: UefiSettings will not be enabled unless this property is set as TrustedLaunch.
Specifies whether secure boot should be enabled on the virtual machine.
Specifies whether vTPM (Virtual Trusted Platform Module) should be enabled on the virtual machine.
